text:
The discussion shall be chaired by [the child[ren]’s solicitor] / [name].

[A minute] / [A transcript] of the discussion shall be filed at court and served on the parties by 4.00pm on [date]. [The costs of the transcript shall be paid by the parties equally.]

The child[ren]’s solicitor shall file at court and serve on the parties a statement of agreement and disagreement not later than 4.00pm on [date not later than 5 working days after the discussion].

Any application for permission to call an expert to give oral evidence must be made not later than 1 working day before the [pre-IRH] / [pre-PTR] advocates meeting.

The following experts shall give their evidence concurrently: [names]

[Name of expert] shall give evidence by video link. [Name] must send the expert a witness bundle not later than 2 working days before the hearing.

The cost of the expert[s] report [, attendance at an expert’s discussion] [, and attending to give evidence] shall be paid by [by the parties equally] / [name].

Permission is given to disclose the reports of [names of experts] to any person or professional providing treatment, therapy or counselling to the parents or the child[ren].

The provisions of FPR 25.19(1) apply to [the child[ren]’s solicitor] / [name of party instructing’s solicitor].

In respect of the court’s sealed order and approved [written] / [transcript of] judgment (or in the absence of written or transcribed judgment any written note taken by the advocate), the provisions of FPR 25.19(2) apply. [The child[ren]’s solicitor] / [Name of party instructing’s solicitor] is directed to provide a copy of the sealed court order and approved [written] / [transcript of] judgment (or in the absence of written or transcribed judgment any written note taken by the advocate) to [name of expert(s)] within 10 working days of these being received.

(insert into schedule to the order)

DIRECTIONS IN RESPECT OF THE EXPERT INSTRUCTION

(where the expert is within laa rates and hours)

The following directions shall apply to the instruction of [name of expert]:

The lead for the instruction of the expert shall be [name].
